resources.name: Word of the Day
resources.description: Hero card with today's vocab word, definition, audio button, and add-to-queue CTA. Powered by get_word_of_the_day.

resources.name: Flashcards
resources.description: Tap-to-flip flashcard deck. 'I knew this / I didn't' buttons persist mastery via the same tables as the web app. Powered by get_flashcards.

resources.name: Quiz
resources.description: Interactive multiple-choice quiz. Per-answer events flow to record_word_result; session totals to record_session_complete. Powered by generate_quiz.

resources.name: Study Plan
resources.description: Seven-day expandable plan grid. 'Start Day N' launches a flashcard session seeded with that day's words. Powered by study_plan_preview.

resources.name: My Progress
resources.description: Auth-only personal dashboard: streak, XP, mastery split, next-up words, and recent misses. Powered by get_my_progress.

resources.name: Game · Word Match
resources.description: Tap a word, then tap its definition. Per-pair answers persist via record_word_result; round end awards XP. Powered by play_game (slug=word_match).

resources.name: Game · Spelling Bee
resources.description: Type the word from its definition (with audio). Per-word results persist; round XP awards via award_game_xp. Powered by play_game (slug=spelling_bee).

resources.name: Game · Speed Round
resources.description: 60-second timed sprint with streak bonuses. Powered by play_game (slug=speed_round).

resources.name: Game · Synonym Showdown
resources.description: Pick the closest synonym for each word. Powered by play_game (slug=synonym_showdown).

resources.name: Game · Word Scramble
resources.description: Unscramble the letters to spell each vocab word. Powered by play_game (slug=word_scramble).

resources.name: Game · Fill in the Blank
resources.description: Pick the word that completes each sentence. Powered by play_game (slug=fill_in_blank).

resources.name: Game · Context Clues
resources.description: Infer each word's meaning from a surrounding sentence. Powered by play_game (slug=context_clues).

resources.name: Game · Word Guess
resources.description: Hangman-style letter guessing for vocab words. Powered by play_game (slug=word_guess).

resources.name: Game · Picture Match
resources.description: Match each word to its emoji-cued image. Powered by play_game (slug=picture_match).

resources.name: Game · Crossword
resources.description: Mini vocabulary crossword. Powered by play_game (slug=crossword).

resources.name: Game · Word Search
resources.description: Find hidden vocab words in a letter grid. Powered by play_game (slug=word_search).

resources.name: Session Debrief
resources.description: Post-session summary with weak words, next-up queue, and Sparkle's recommended next action. Powered by get_sparkle_guidance / get_my_progress.
